CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Linked_Invoice__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c , 'Interest') , TEXT(leaseworks__Linked_Invoice__r.leaseworks__Accounting_Method__c) , IF( ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Linked_Invoice__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c , 'Aircraft MR') , TEXT(leaseworks__Linked_Invoice__r.leaseworks__MR_Accounting_Method__c) , IF( ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Linked_Invoice__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c , 'Security Deposit') , TEXT(leaseworks__Linked_Invoice__r.leaseworks__SD_Accounting_Method__c),null)))
CustomField.label: _accounting method
